provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a user turn where the user provides a non-email identity fallback plus order identifier, but the assistant still needs account verification before taking any order action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Scores prioritize the action that most directly authenticates the user using newly supplied information while avoiding premature order mutation.
